Signed patch bundle (bundleVersion 15, minApp 1.2.0). Update via the app's "Update patches" button — no app reinstall needed.

## Changelog
- **Spoof Profile Gifts:** added **convert_stars** spoofing — the gift's "convert to N Stars" value is
  rewritten locally (on both the gift and the saved-gift record). Set it in that patch's Settings window.
